quicksight.dashboard.tooltipitem.CfnAbou:
The tooltip.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.dashboard.tooltipitem.ColumnT.Description: The tooltip item for the columns that are not part of a field well.

quicksight.dashboard.tooltipitem.FieldTo.Description: The tooltip item for the fields.
